extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked early enough to hold 24 seconds at 500m to go, taking the stage while KWIATKOWSKI rode defensively to protect yellow despite missing time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: KWIATKOWSKI defended yellow passively without contesting bonus seconds, revealing Sky/conservative tactics prioritize gap protection over offensive racing.
PINOT Thibaut attacked after finish for bonus seconds despite stage being decided, showing aggressive pursuit of overall position.
Mitchelton-Scott's YATES descended aggressively to build 24-second gap, showing descending skills as underutilized weapon in stage-race finales.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked early and descended to build decisive 24-second gap, combining climbing and technical skills effectively
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: neutral: defensive yellow-jersey tactics succeeded but revealed unwillingness to contest bonus seconds despite close GC
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: continued attacking post-finish for bonus seconds showing relentless GC focus even in minor placings
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: finished ahead of Kwiatkowski in final sprint, showing unexpected sprint speed for GC rider
